ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player (e.g., Center Back, Left Striker) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in centimeters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "preferred_foot" TEXT /* Preferred foot of the player (e.g., Left, Right) */,
  "contract_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the player's contract */,
  "contract_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the player's contract */,
  "market_value" REAL /* Market value of the player in millions */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* Current injury status of the player (e.g., Fit, Injured) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the team plays in (e.g., Premier League, La Liga) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the team is based */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the team's home stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the team's home stadium */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's manager */,
  "manager_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the current manager */,
  "team_value" REAL /* Total market value of the team in millions */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistical entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player */,
  "expected_goals" REAL /* Expected number of goals scored by the player */,
  "shots" INTEGER /* Number of shots taken by the player */,
  "shot_on_target" INTEGER /* Number of shots on target by the player */,
  "passes_completed" INTEGER /* Number of passes completed by the player */,
  "passes_intercepted" INTEGER /* Number of passes intercepted by the player */,
  "fouls_committed" INTEGER /* Number of fouls committed by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists made by the player */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received by the player */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received by the player */,
  "touch_count" INTEGER /* Number of touches the player had on the ball */,
  "tackles_made" INTEGER /* Number of tackles made by the player */,
  "tackles_won" INTEGER /* Number of tackles won by the player */,
  "interceptions" INTEGER /* Number of interceptions made by the player */,
  "dribbles_attempted" INTEGER /* Number of dribbles attempted by the player */,
  "dribbles_completed" INTEGER /* Number of dribbles completed by the player */,
  "fouls_suffered" INTEGER /* Number of fouls suffered by the player */,
  "offsides" INTEGER /* Number of times the player was caught offside */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the match (e.g., 2-1, 0-0) */,
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stadium where the match was played */,
  "referee_name" TEXT /* Name of the referee for the match */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the match */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the match (e.g., Sunny, Rainy) */,
  "half_time_result" TEXT /* Result at half-time (e.g., 1-0, 0-0) */,
  "match_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the match in minutes */,
  "injury_time" INTEGER /* Total injury time in minutes */,
  "home_team_goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the home team */,
  "away_team_goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the away team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_stadium_id FOREIGN KEY ("stadium_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
